title: Marina Green - West (Little Marina) | San Francisco Recreation and Parks, CA
content: # Marina Green - West (Little Marina). The Marina Green, located in San Francisco's scenic Marina District, is located along the San Francisco Bay, running the expanse between Fort Mason and the Presidio. Located nearby and visible from the Marina Green, is one of the only remnants of the 1915 Panama-Pacific International Exposition - the Palace of Fine Arts. This area is not only an attraction  for tourists, due to the sights and history, but is also a local hangout for runners, athletes, and casual picnickers.
